title: cremanthodium delavayi
intro: Cremanthodium delavayi, also known as the Tibetan daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and has been used to treat various ailments including digestive issues and respiratory problems. Cremanthodium delavayi is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine and herbal remedies.
